hooks.command:
echo '{"systemMessage": "Session complete. Reminders:
• Run /simplify if you wrote or edited code this session
• Run /security-review before shipping any auth, payment, or credential-handling feature
• Run /schema-sync if you touched lib/db/schema.ts or docs/data-model/
• Update docs/progress.md and docs/file-map.md with any new files created"}'
